ai_coach.headline: No telemetry synced today, but it's Match Day -- fuel at 3500 kcal / 500g carbs with 60% timed around the game.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, RHR, or body battery data has synced yet, so readiness can't be quantified this morning. Treat this as an unknown-recovery match day: warm up thoroughly and let on-field feel dictate intensity ramp rather than a numeric readiness score.
action_plan: Log last night's sleep and morning HRV/RHR as soon as your wearable syncs so today's readiness can be assessed.
Pre-load 60% of the 500g carb target (~300g) split across pre- and immediately post-match meals.
Drink 4.5-5.0L fluids today (3.5-4.0L baseline + 1.0L electrolyte add-on) given the match/team-output day.
Hit true maximal effort on sprint/explosive actions during play -- no coasting in the grey zone.
Log the match session (or nearest gym session) in Hevy today so training consistency and PRs stay current.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Match Day allowance is 3500 kcal / 215g protein / 500g carb / 71g fat -- route ~300g of carbs into pre- and post-match meals per the 60% pacing rule, and add the +1.0L electrolyte fluid bump on top of your 3.5-4.0L baseline.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight entries or glide-path history are logged yet, so trend vs. the 83.0 kg target can't be assessed -- log a weigh-in to start populating the arc.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry (sleep, HRV, RHR, steps, body battery) synced -- readiness is a blind spot today.
Gym consistency at 0/4 scheduled days logged this cycle -- adherence tracking has a gap.
No weight history logged -- 24-week glide path can't be validated against reality yet.

overview.summary: All core telemetry (weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, battery) is unsynced this morning, leaving no quantitative read on today's state.
overview.suggestion: Sync your wearable/scale before the match so today's load can be calibrated against real recovery data.

plan.summary: No weight history or glide-path entries exist yet, so progress toward the 83.0 kg target and phase milestones (wk8/16/24) can't be evaluated.
plan.suggestion: Log today's body weight to establish the first data point on the glide path.

training.summary: Readiness and load are both null and 0 of 4 scheduled gym days are logged this cycle, so there's no basis to judge accumulated fatigue heading into the match.
training.suggestion: Play the match at full intensity as planned, but treat any lingering soreness or heavy legs as a signal to scale back tomorrow's gym volume rather than pushing through blind.

gym.summary: No Hevy session data is available, so the current split, most recent lift, and PR status are unknown.
gym.suggestion: Log your next lifting session in Hevy immediately after so load progression and PRs can be tracked again.

sleep.summary: Last night's sleep record and the 90-day history are both empty, so quality and stress/body-battery trend can't be read.
sleep.suggestion: Get sleep tracking active tonight (device worn/synced) so tomorrow's readiness call has real input.

nutrition.summary: Nothing has been logged today against the 3500 kcal / 215g protein / 500g carb / 71g fat Match Day target.
nutrition.suggestion: Log your pre-match meal now, front-loading carbs so it plus the post-match meal covers roughly 300g of the day's 500g carb target.
